label: Fixes
items: Watchlist: the Perenual and AI search buttons work again (typing Enter always did).
Watchlist plant links now refresh live across devices.
Garden editor: the floating Layers menu no longer breaks when opening Companions.
Plant Doctor chat: "Regenerate" now actually re-asks your question.

label: Smarter AI grounding
items: Your measured light readings now inform every AI feature — area advice, plant suggestions, rotation planning and the visualiser all know how sunny each area really is.
The garden coach also sees your recent week's real temperatures and rainfall.
